reviews.review_title: BEST GAME MONEY CAN BUY ( Worth it)
reviews.review_description: I had it with horizon plus but after a while it left it, that was disappointing BUT this game was one of my favorite games I could not stop playing it. I had to buy it after it left horizon plus but I spent my money well, it also saves your progress Evan if your not connected at the start. It's really cool how real it feels, if I could give it a  11/10 I would.

Best game ever played. There still some little bugs but otherwise best, There 16 mission and if ur thinking to buy/play its worth it. Ratings:violence 8.5/10 There is violence but blood r not high that much. graphics:10/10 best graphics ever seen.story:9.5/10 W story. Puzzles:9/10 hard Puzzle but interesting. That's it my review. Recommended

reviews.review_title: Honestly the best game I have ever playe
reviews.review_description:
This is a fully honest review, I love this game.
The graphics and details are so amazing, there are things you can find in this game that are so detailed, even thought they are not even part of the main game. The fighting is so satisfying and the story is great.
Worth every penny! 🙌🙌🙌

reviews.review_title: The best open world game to date
reviews.review_description: I’ve never left a review but I just had to say thank you to the developers for designing the most perfect type of game for meta quest.  I’ve literally purchased over a hundred games for my meta quest and I’m constantly disappointed but I always continue to play Assassins Creed.  I love that you can jump, squat, and literally climb everything and the mechanics are nearly flawless.  It’s so real that I actually get butterflies in my stomach when I jump or climb high places.  Sounds behind you and to the sides are perfect, and I can literally play this game differently everytime I play because I climb different buildings or explore new areas every game.  This game deserves 10 stars, still the best game for meta quest and I pray they come out with another because literally everything else is a disappointment, the developers went above and beyond the amount of content is insane and Its so nice how much work you guys put in to just the stuff most players probably won’t even see

reviews.review_title: Amazing game besides some weird combat!
reviews.review_description: This was my first assassin’s creed game and the one that got me into the series. The one thing that is a little weird about this game is that the combat system is finicky, it works fine for what it is, but it’s not the best compared to the normal console games, mainly because your hits dont always land where you expect them to. Besides that, 10/10 game!

Voice acting sounded very bad and I wish that you were able to link it to your main account and play all the main games you've already played in the franchise
It's terrible I barely played it and now I can't even get a refund

I just finished AC:N and now... what else is out there to play in VR?  This is the cream of the crop.  The game play is a blast.  The parkour is dizzying.  The challenges a blast.  The abilities are amazing.  The only problem with playing this game is that it is the tip top in game play.... after this, nothing compares... to you...

I have a lot of games in my library and this is one of the best.

Very good story the graphics are exceptional, and there’s so much to do in the game. If you’re going to spend $40 on a VR game this is the one to do it on besides Batman Arkham Shadow.

reviews.review_title: The best game i ever played
reviews.review_description: I couldn't collect everything, but it's a really great game. It's one of the best games I've ever played, and even though I was just a kid playing it, it was incredibly excellent. I hope they release another game like this.

This is by a long shot one of the best games on meta VR to date. Of course it has its flaws just like every other game. If you cant have fun with this game, your dead inside. The graphics are fantastic for being a vr game and I haven't noticed any glitching. 

 Grow a set and have some fun. Its the first time a game like this is avaliable on meta vr. Its going to have problems.  It is light years ahead of most other games on this platform. I would imagine alot of people that have all the problems are coming from pc vr. 

Pc vr is not easily achieved for most people. Very expensive and needs lots of room. This is small and compact and anyone can play it. 

Great game.

If you're really looking for parkour this is the game and this has my story game in VR. It is a lot of fun and it's 100% worth it. I hope you enjoy the game cuz I definitely did. I also did complete it

This game brought back my childhood as I played ac2 and brotherhood they were the best games and this brought back memories it’s worth getting but it would be cool if it had free roam so I can do what I want but best decision I’ve made so far over buying this THIS GAME IS RECOMMENDED

This is a great game. It has a free to explore map. The map has enemies roaming around the free to explore map usually.
 
The game is pretty long but it's also a little short. It might just be me but I beat this game under a month and I think there should be a 2nd game if there isn't one already.

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR Games for Quest.
reviews.review_description: This is my third time I am going to finish the game. I really love it. The sceneries are fantastic. It really gives you the feeling that you are inside of the game playing as Etzio. The first time I played it I had to practice a little in order to get used to the mechanics. But after you finish it one time it becomes more fluid and enjoyable. I'm giving it 5 stars.
6 Sterne 🌟

First off: game opens up more once you are in Greece. Once you are in Greece, you finally have random enemies in the city you can go around and kill. So play until Greece if you get annoyed by all the silly limitations.

The game, in context of Quest VR games available, is definitely one of the best. The open world maps with npcs you can push around. Really missed opportunity not letting kill civilians and raise wanted level. Along with not having free to play open world modes in the respective cities. This could have been a GTA of Quest but instead you get frustrated by the open world and just focus on completing main quest.

Some polish is missing from the game, I really feel like they could have spent another year developing and being little more ambitious. Alas, I hope the game has been successful enough where they will follow up with sequel that has more freedom and polish.

For the gameplay loop that involves assassinations, it's an easy game. And exactly what you want if you enjoy satisfaction of being great assassin without much effort. I am quite happy with the game.

This is a great game the parkour, the fighting style, everything. It is one of my favorite VR games and I honestly don’t know if I could go back to any other combat base games like Blade & sorcery or￼ dungeons of eternity I genuinely think this is one of the best stealth games I’ve ever played in VR the only thing I wish you were able to do is play as altar or Edward Kenway. But in all fairness it looks great so Keep up the good work.￼ 👍

I loved assassins creed growing up and when this got announced I was so excited to see how this would translate to VR. I uninstalled it after 4 missions.

The movement is so clunky compared to other AAA vr games, especially when trying to swing off of a pole. The movement can really ruin your momentum during your play session in a lot of areas.

The combat is also a massive letdown, it’s very scripted, choppy, and constraining.

If those things don’t bother you too much, you’ll still enjoy it. It’s still very cool to sneak up and use the hidden blades and use other mechanics from the past games. The game isn’t necessarily bad, it’s just not the smooth experience that you might expect from the series.

I spent about 15 hours beating this game. It is truly amazing all the way. Graphics are astonishing! All 3 words are very well made, lots of play strategy to choose from. You can go from full stealth to blasting  your way through. Game at your own pace. Interesting story. Great game overall!
Devs you should add more gore and different story lines.

This is problay the best game i have ever played in vr the grapichs Are Amazing and i just love this game so much but you Guys should come with  some updates here and there like some new misions or something but overall a very great game

It's a very long game so you get your money's worth from that aspect, but it feels like you're playing an old game. I like to play sitting down because I have little space and also prefer to be relaxed. The puzzle aspects were simple and not very challenging. I like the stealth aspect because I can creep about and avoid combat... But you can't avoid combat in boss levels. I wish there was a way you could bypass boss levels (in all games) because I just find them annoying and too difficult. I am waving my arms about without a clue what I am actually doing and so usually only make it through more by luck than judgement. Sadly, on Level 14 (I think) I found myself unable to beat an old man with a sword and after about 30 attempts I have abandoned the game.

The voice over is English but the written instructions are not.
I looked on how to change it all to English but the instructions I have seen do not appear correct.
No menu at start etc.
I have removed it and reloaded it but it is the same but in a different language, first appeared French, second seemed German.
Waiting to play once I get English instructions.
This game is one of my favourite vr games it’s so fun, I spend most my time admiring the scenery and the art. It’s just a great game. Keep up the good work Ubisoft.

Don’t waste your time playing this game. The graphics are good but that’s about it. All of the climbing, jumping, and obstacles are broken. You will find yourself in one spot for an hour because nothing works right and you just have to get lucky that the grabbing function works for once. I was excited to play this but it was a huge disappointment.￼

reviews.review_title: Brilliant game and just finished it
reviews.review_description: I’ve just finished the game sadly as I really want to play through it again. Hopefully in the future they will make another game because this game is one of the best vr games out there currently and has great physics and good fights/battles i strongly recommend this game for new vr players and people that are new to the assassins creed games.
Ehh
I am very close to finishing and it has been so fun and it has ran almost  completely smoothly throughout all of it exept I froze once and it doesn’t deserve the hate it gets
It could be so good but OH MY GOD the amount of unskippable tutorials, and the combat is atrocious.  Just atrocious the worst combat of any game I've ever played on Quest.   Freaking awful.

This is a near perfect VR experience. Even as someone who has not experienced Assassin’s Creed before, I found myself hooked on the enthralling storyline, beautiful graphics and environments, and stealth mechanics. Some improvements the game can use is mostly centered around the combat. The enemies lack great AI and the fights feel boring and repetitive at times, which can drive some people to only use stealth. Climbing can be quite buggy at times too—only being able to hold on to some corners of walls and your screen turning black when you put your head too far forward into one. Overall an amazing game with a great ending and fun storyline—can’t wait for the next installment!

As a lifelong AC fan, this game is super boring. Crappy immersion, horrible combat, buggy parcore. Not to mention the lack excitement or purpose in every mission. Definitely not worth the 17 gb or whatever taking up space and the price.

reviews.review_title: OMG, BUY THIS, REAL VR, REALLY AMAZING
reviews.review_description:
So I've had this game for over a year and I just now beat it! I wanted to wait until I beat the game to give it a review and I have to say... FIVE FREAKING STARS!!!!! 

I absolutely love it. I'm a hardcore assassin's Creed fan. I've pretty much been there since the very beginning, I'm 43 so that should track lol. 
I am a hardcore VR player. I like to think of myself as that. I like intense VR. The only thing I would do different is make it so you can flip upside down but there's not really any need for that in this game so, no worries. 
there's always going to be another one, right? RIGHT??!!! 
YOU GUYS HAVE TO MAKE ANOTHER ONE BECAUSE THIS ONE WAS FANTASTIC AND IT'S ONLY GOING TO GET BETTER!!!! 

super amazing game. It has just about everything you want in a VR game. 
But remember, it's an assassin's Creed game and it's utilizing Quest 2 and Quest 3. I loved the climbing, I think it's probably the very best climbing fighting game there is. I loved the stealth and the whole pulling out the hidden blade and stabbing dudes, and sounds evil lol, in the head. 
It was just like playing assassin's Creed but first person, like a dream come true. 

I would personally play it on hard mode if you are a veteran player. This is a fun game, it is challenging but it's not the hardest game I've ever played. It could have been harder but I'm okay with its difficulty. 
All in all it was very fun and it was very very long! I played it sparingly & I made it last a year! 

PROPS TO THE DEVS, PROPS TO THE COMPANY... YOU GUYS REPRESENTED VERY WELL. like I said, please make another one.
there's nothing to really fix or add to this one, just make another one and I would love to test it!

My only gripe with the game is that it isn’t longer. There are 16 missions broken up between each the three characters, which has a ton of replay ability don’t get me wrong but it would’ve been nice to see more(hopefully a second game.)  the parkour is fun and intuitive, jumping from building to building and swinging from ropes on ships feels the way it should. At no point (so far)did I have any issues with frame rate drops or lag. The only bug I’ve encountered is when shooting red coats with a bow. If they run at you, sometimes your arrow will clip through the enemy unless they stop moving. All in all the game has much more good than bad. Definitely a game I’m putting in my top 5, I would love to play another one.

Dear ubisoft really it caint end like that we as vr games deserve a really assassins full game experience. Like take black flag to vr or  mirage 
Or even bring altir to vr and the twins that would be top top top selleling I would definitely invest and I been a assassins creed fan since our dear friend altir I even played the Chronicles please make a new one this one was absolutely genius besides the ending
This has the bones of a good assassin's creed game with LOTS of jank of bugs. I think its a good idea for ubisoft to step away from vr.

reviews.review_title: Seriously one of the best VR games!
reviews.review_description:
Use my code for 15% off. (Just type meta dot com and then paste the link below with no space in between)

/appreferrals/Ordinary_Pigeon/5812519008825194?utm_source=oculus&utm_location=2&utm_parent=frl&utm_medium=app_referral&utm_content=copy

I really enjoyed this game! Definitely worth a playthrough
Not as good as Batman Arkham Shadows but still an 11/10

Most of the time you can't lock pick and also the climbing is so slow but please ad multilayer it's good by its self but why make the missions with kassandra so hard. the best Misson is Italy Venice  when you get the crossbow and make so you move your arms your character runs

I downloaded the game and I forgot ABT it but then I saw the game and I was like nooooo wayyyyy I forgot ABT this! So I played it I beat it in 2 days (could be longer) but omg the graphics are mental or vr! Best vr game I've ever played 🔥🔥🔥

It’s a great game, it’s a little different from other games ive played where u kill a bunch of peeps like stride fates. 

DEVS: so I’m trying to find the weavers tools as Kassandra, and I’m stuck, there’s a glitch so the tools aren’t there, the icon the shows me where the next mission is located also isn’t there. I even looked up a video showing me where the tools were and they weren’t there when I went to the spot, help me.

reviews.review_title: Make a new one with more levels
reviews.review_description:
I love this game so much and I wish it was another game the graphics movement. Everything is so good.
￼

reviews.review_title: Makes me feel like a true assassin
reviews.review_description: This might be one of the best vr games to ever come out,its pretty much open world,and you get to be sick assassins from ac,what more could you ask for.the only thing I don’t like is the whole you’re a hacker who plays as these characters and not the actual person ya know

This is such an awesome game, it looks amazing, haven't hit any bugs and I've played about 1.5 hours. Everything makes sense. The story is great. 
Honestly the people saying their controller broke, I don't see how but if it does it's worth it!
My headset is over a year old and I don't see the controller screwing up at all

It’s an amazing take on an already great franchise! Incredibly fun and immersive! The combat and assassination is great! After a successful mission I personally get a rush of satisfaction. It is worth the price tag for sure. (I did have a small glitch when turning on the game it wouldn’t load, but after uninstalling and reinstalling it was fixed)
Well, finally I have got a chance to play the game and finish it. It was very interesting, outstanding and amazing. The only thing is that fight mechanics could be improved. But overall, super!
It is an amazing game really gets the assassins creed vibe just wish they could add more memories to the game or more characters to play as

ENGLISH:

If you are not a conformist, you will agree with the following that I will say:

Quick answer: it's a bad game "sushi ben" it's better done

Long answer: where to start? This game is not even worth 10 dollars you know how it is ubisoft releases bad games with too much potential this thing is full of bugs you have to be returning to the checkpoint all the time because there are bugs that do not let you continue the missions and when at last you have no bugs the game crashes and other times you have to close the game and reopen it to correct all the errors of the game temporarily this game is broken and they laugh at you in your face with that ridiculous price now in performance it is also bad This game too many micro pulls and let's not even talk about the audio is the worst equation I heard in my life an indie game has better audio and dubbing than this thing when downloading the dubbing I also had some bugs not only the gameplay is broken but also the menus and user interface the game is so bad that after 6 hours supporting that and decided to uninstall it is a lot of suffering trying to play this the parkour is also broken the combat mechanics were interesting to me but guess what? THE HITBOXES ARE ALSO BROKEN, THEY ARE HORRIBLE!! Aaah and I don't recommend this even to Assassins Creed fans. Why? Why is it possible that Connor's hidden sheet has been returned as if it were that of Ézio auditore? Connor's hidden blade can be rotated and become a combat knife which they could not implement in this game because they do not want to work more, I am sure that some random person who makes mods for blade and sorcery could do a better job with the hidden blade than ubisoft this can not even be considered an AAA because let's see, are you telling me that metro awakening that costs less is better polished? And your ubisoft, do you dare to charge me more for a game that gives more headaches than gameplay? I'm sorry, this probably seems like a lot of text to you but I tried to summarize all the problems of the game and even so I lacked more problems to list luckily I played it with meta horizon plus why not even jokingly worth the full price of this game

ESPAÑOL:

Si no eres conformista estarás de acuerdo con lo siguiente que diré:
Respuesta rápida: es un mal juego “sushi ben” esta mejor hecho 
Respuesta larga: ¿por dónde empezar? Este juego no vale ni 10 dólares ya saben cómo es ubisoft saca juegos malos con demasiado potencial esta cosa está llena de bugs tienes que estar volviendo al punto de control a cada rato por qué hay bugs que no te dejan continuar las misiones y cuando al fin no tienes bugs el juego se crashea y otras veces tienes que cerrar el juego y volverlo a abrir para corregir todos los errores del juego temporalmente este juego está roto y se ríen de ti en tu cara con ese precio tan ridículo ahora en rendimiento también está mal este juego demasiados microtirones y ni hablemos del audio es la peor ecualizacion que escuché en mi vida un juego indie tiene mejor audio y doblaje que esta cosa al descargar el doblaje también tuve algunos bugs no solo el gameplay está roto también los menús e interfaz de usuario el juego es tan malo que luego de 6 horas soportando eso e decidido desinstalarlo es mucho sufrimiento intentar jugar esto el parkour también está roto las mecánicas de combate se me hicieron interesantes pero adivina que? TAMBIÉN ESTÁN ROTAS LAS HITBOX SON HORRIBLES!! Aaah y esto no lo recomiendo ni a los fans de assassins creed ¿Por qué? Por que como es posible que la hoja oculta de connor la hayan vuelto como si fuera la de ézio auditore? La hoja oculta de connor se puede girar y convertirse en un cuchillo de combate cosa que no pudieron implementar en este juego por no querer trabajar más, estoy seguro que alguna persona random que hace mods para blade and sorcery podría hacer un mejor trabajo con la hoja oculta que ubisoft esto ni si quiera puede ser considerado un AAA por que a ver, me estás diciendo que metro awakening que cuesta menos está mejor pulido? Y tu ubisoft te atreves a cobrarme más por un juego que da más dolores de cabeza que gameplay? Lo siento probablemente esto les parezca mucho texto pero trate de resumir todos los problemas del juego y aún así me faltaron más problemas por enlistar por suerte lo jugué con meta horizon plus por qué ni de broma vale el precio completo este juego

This game made me exhilarated at first, I’ve always wanted to play an up close and personal assassin’s creed game, and it was finally here. Unfortunately, that wasn’t exactly what I got. I got more of a non free roam vibe and felt like I was playing assassin’s creed but only while you’re currently in a mission. Other than that, it’s fun overall. The combat is good, but it could use some help on how dead bodies are nearly immovable, the game can lag, the combat is almost too easy, and, like I said, there is no free play or anything like all the other games in the franchise. But just because I said all this doesn’t mean it’s bad, it’s still a good one for beginners to VR and something fresh for old players.
This game is so freaking fun i love it dont listen to the other 1 star reviews the only it takes up a lot of gb but i understand i love this game

This was my first Assassin's Creed game and I loved it so much it made me want to find the OG PC games and buy them! I love the story line and game graphics! Although in the middle levels the game started to randomly pause or turn my POV in a different direction. After a few levels of this it stopped and never started again and I have no idea why it did it in the first place. But otherwise I absolutely loved it!! I want a second installment with more Assassins to play!!

This game has the potential du be a 5 stars, but control are terrible on mouvement climbing and others actions that litterally ruin the immertion and the game. Not even finished before unistalled. Thats a shame for a big studio and liscence like that
this game is amazing the combat could b better and wish the menus had a dark mode but love it

reviews.review_title: Fun and realistic but some suggestions
reviews.review_description: In my opinion I feel like it would be better if you could add multiplayer so you and your friend or a random person can be assassins. I know it’s sounds stupid but I would like to play with my friend. And you absolutely need to collab with developers of realistic human games and survival and make a Rome roleplay kind of as in you could start as a peasant or a slave and have to work your way up to all of the ranks and you have to roll to choose what family to be birthed in and you could be a farmer and go through childhood adulthood and raise a family and be able to have shops as in metal working and you can also fight in a Colosseum if your a slave and make it multiplayer and you have to manage food and drinks and you can fight in the army and I suggest collaborating with the creators of medieval dynasty and those other games and by the way make livestock available and jobs such as brewery and metal working and grain managing and cloth making and you can have horses and you can start a business and hire actual player servants and you can get paid for being a servant but not as a slave you wouldn’t get paid as a slave and you can pick your name and religion and you can be an emperor and manage the army and expand the empire and you can also be a guard if you survive as a gladiator and also you should collab with gladius creators for the colosseum. This is an edit ngl why did I put all this it’s vr and vr doesn’t have enough space or good graphics for that but we have to agree it would be cool
i have tried downloading this three times and i'm on my 4th time.  i am sure the game is great but until this is fixed i won't know meta 3s

The first time I downloaded, the game didn’t run, and I had to uninstall and reinstall it. After doing that, everything worked perfectly and I’m really glad I gave it another chance.

The graphics are amazing, the story is engaging, and I felt completely immersed in the characters. It truly feels like you’re inside the Assassin’s Creed world. Once it was running properly, I had a great time playing and really enjoyed the overall experience.

I was having fun even with the clunky gameplay but then I got stuck trying to double hand lunge myself up a wall. In the console games the character’s hands and feet are sticky, but here you will slip, fall, and miss your parkour moves like never before. The combat is also clunky and way too easy. Toggle run at the enemies with your blade exposed and they’ll die.

Anybody saying this game is the best are either lying due to incentive or have little experience playing good vr games. No way these “best game ever” reviews are legit.

2-stars for falling too short of what could have been the best game in the series.
I cant even pick lock even to get to a misson because it keeps letting go of the picklock
This game is amazing. Everything about it is AWESOME!! it is definetly worth the price.

I've played Black flags, Rouge, Freedom cry, liberation, and assassins creed 3 and this takes close to the top out of those 5. I love the vr aspect and don't even get me STARTED on those graphics. Instant 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: Haven't played but it looks fun. Played
reviews.review_description:
Bro my only gripe so far is how long it takes to download because it's been 3 hrs.
 update I LOVE IT the download time is worth it get this game.
They could have said at the ending to be continued.
This game is worth the money you get to be enzio kasadra and Conner the game is PERFRCT MUSY BUY TRYST

It's a great game however the only complaint i have is the fact pressing x to abandon the parkour events doesn't work at all ssp i end up getting pissed off with the movement and end up having to quit the game entirely and restarting it just to get out of it

reviews.review_title: Good, but I have a suggestion
reviews.review_description: So, I love this game and really enjoyed the story, but after I completed the story, there is nothing to do! You should add like a sandbox, creative, or arena. This would make this a 6 star game!

If you like a lot of action this is for you and it adds a little bit of puzzles and stealth and it lasts forever 

I though this was a another game trying to be big but this game should be really good and there isn’t anything for anyone to complain about 

I would only ask if they added a gun from the original trilogy 

This game allows you to play as 3 amazing characters 

Ezio is an Italian looking for the person who took his treasures 

Casandra is a Rome Whi has decide her place in a war 

Connor is a American who is freeing prisoners and stops executions

And the story is also amazing as you are a hacker Whi was hired to find relics that were in the past hence you become one of the characters and search for these relics

Free play is also an amazing option they added as if you wanted to kill someone else but you couldn’t then you can just go back onto the level 

Thanks for making such an amazing game and I hope you continue to make games like this

An absolutely amazing game. Being able to have wrist blades fr was so cool. I just wish they were more useful. I feel like I only ever used the sword. If they could block a full attack without being thrown back it would be amazing. I also feel that they should make a sequel! That ending was really cool! Here's the idea, right?  A sequel game where you have to stop the lady from getting the pieces, by going in as yourself and destroying them before she can scan them, then having to fight her. You guys could make a very modern new assassin model with a black hoodie an stuff and brand new hidden blades. This was such a fun gaming experience and I'm so sad it had to end! For being my second ever assassins creed game, I'm so happy I got to experience this.

Just simple change  an change the game experience. Double click grab button to run. Really you create game for the people and can't create a normal control... . All other things in the game really cool... . If you won't update movement then no reason to play.

I thought the game was showt but in on 10th hour and still gave missions to do it is realy realistic the fighting is not the best but its not bad the parkour is crazy (not sloppy ones) I think its really good game and defanitly a game you should play.
Having to use L3 for movement is awful, and breaks controllers. Same problem with Syberia but at least it was a shorter game.

I got it hoping it wouldn’t be butchered like most Ubisoft games and call me a fool. There’s no free world, all you have is you spawn into a map, doing some boring objective, and despawn from existence. The combat isn’t even exciting. Wow I blocked, then stabbed him and it didn’t hurt him, then sliced him and he died. They don’t even ragdoll, they just fall over. You can move them and they ragdoll. Blade and Sorcery is more exciting than this because at least the combat is interesting, it’s modable, and the enemy reacts to your attack. I wouldn’t play the game if I had it for free.

I won’t lie this is the game that got me into the assassins creed franchise. The parkour in this game is magnificent one of the best I’ve seen in a vr game  and the stealth is pretty alright, the hidden blade  is really cool love it a lot. My only dislikes of this game is the combat is pretty clunky and you can’t really be aggressive and now that I’ve played the assassin creed games I really wish this game was longer. (Also I do not like the 3d puzzle but luckily there aren’t that many of them)
The npcs do the same attack every time and nothing about it is really hard, the pvp sucks, the graphics are mediocre, and it just feels like they cut corners

Initially, I refunded this game. Then decided to try again as it became available in Horizon plus. My reason for asking for refund was due to graphics and controls being 'janky'. But what kept me playing and completing was the storylines. You go to Greece, Italy, and even America before the revolution. There is a lot of educational stuff in there as well. I found that fascinating,  especially the architecture which led me to hunt for all the historical artifacts. While I wish it was more polished, it is worth a buy when on sale.

The best ever. I’m so impressed. THIS IS A MUST BUY. ANYDAY TO PLAY. THE BEST!!!!!! I LOVE THIS GAME MORE THEN MY LIFE. Guys I’ve played this game more than 8 times as the 3 different characters. Connor Kenway was my favourite. The levels are different, fun and energetic and most importantly Action Packed. Must by. Please make another one!!
So I’ve been playing this game and I can’t go back to my level. I’m on my brother’s level I don’t know how to go back, but it’s  still a good game ￼ ￼￼

I was very weary about picking this up because I
 know it uses reprojection and I'm very sensitive to it but to my surprise, the reprojection is barely noticeable in minute to minute gameplay.

Yes it's there if you know what to look for or extremely sensitive to it but it's better than the reprojection the PSVR2 is notorious for.

Played 3 chapters so far and have enjoyed every moment of it. It's a AC game that's more in line with the early titles where stealth is a huge focus and much more fun to execute rather than trying to Ip Man 1 v 10.

Definitely give a shot. As someone who enjoyed the AC series but not an obsessive fan, this title really hits the best notes of the series.

reviews.review_title: I LOVE THIS GAME, BEST VR GAME EVER
reviews.review_description: I love the gameplay, and free roam ability, but I would definitely suggest like a training mode, like in vr Star Wars, just were you can move around an arena. And add stealth kill ability’s.
I love this game! I recommend getting it.

This is more immersive than I expected! The graphics and the details are really good, the world seems and feels lived in, the movement works well...though the crouch button is awkward. There is some clunk here and there and awkward grabbing items sometimes, but once you get the hang of it, it works!
I have a debilitating fear of heights IRL, and this game does give options to ease that for players, but I wanted the full experience and to try to manage my fear somehow. It is definitely dizzying at first going up high but also exhilarating! With all the parkour of the games in this franchise it is surreal to actually feel part of it!
Combat works. Nothing spectacular but it is still dynamic and intuitive. It has a cool way to access the hidden blades. And yeah, seems really fun more than expected. I think for us all to appreciate the potential of VR games, we need to have expectations but not too much. Otherwise we will destroy the possibilities. That is to say we shouldn't just go along with any junk, but also be forgiving to more ambitious games that have a lot of good in them!
I tried the first part of the game on Horizon+ for a free trial, but I hate subscription models, so I want to save up for the game and actually support it when I get a chance. Really fun!
Controls are very unconfortable, it is difficult to grip from some places resulting in repeating obstacles many times, movement doesn’t feel free like most of AC games
